variants: Renee Maier currently resides in Hawkstone Quarters, where she works diligently in the energy sector. She was born in Jetmarsh Outpost and later graduated from the Verdigris School of Law, acquiring valuable legal expertise. Now a key member of Knollstone Energy, her contributions have been recognized with the Bastion Oak Merit award. Renee's journey from her hometown to her successful career serves as an inspiration to many in her field.
